'''ConJob's Trifles''' was a small flower stall located on Level Two's main intercourse on [[Tanquilla Beach/Legends|''Tanquilla Beach'']]. [[ConJob]] grew the flowers in a small [[Hydroponics/Legends|hydroponic garden]] he maintained in his quarters. The business was a brisk one; ConJob soon found that even the hardest [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] needed something to brighten their quarters with, or to remind them of their homeworld. The business was actually a front for ConJob's activities as an [[Information broker/Legends|infochant]] and [[NewsNet]] [[code dealer]], but was a pretty decent business in itself. ConJob often practiced with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in front of the stall to both entertain himself and attract business.
